articles.title: Why Your EC Revenue Quietly Shrinks Even When New Customers Keep Coming 2026
articles.description: Churn hides behind new customer inflow, making revenue decay invisible until it's too late. Here's how to surface it — and why voluntary churn and payment-failure churn need completely different fixes.

articles.title: Why Bot Traffic Quietly Wrecks Your Channel Evaluation (and Your Budget)
articles.description: Bots are now 53% of all web traffic, finally surpassing humans, and GA4 only auto-removes the known ones. The unknown bots slip in as referral traffic, get mistaken for your best channel, and bleed your budget. Here's how to spot them with visits times dwell time.

articles.title: I've spent $60k worth of openai tokens via codex building a few apps. How can I now get users?
Hosted waitlist page vs embed on your site
articles.description: Pick speed or pick trust — most founders choose vanity instead.
